metadata.name: Zoho CRM Complete Customer Journey Map
metadata.purpose: Visual mapping of all modules, workflows, triggers, and integrations
metadata.visualization_notes: Use colors to distinguish: Automatic (green), Manual (blue), 3rd Party (orange), Human Input (yellow)

manual.description: User must set a field to trigger

CallWithIn24Hours_and_Team_Task.action: Creates call task and team task

Format_Number.action: Formats phone numbers to standard format

Lead_Owner_Assignment.action: Assigns lead to appropriate owner based on rules

Course_Details_Updated.action: Updates lead with course details when course selected

contact_lead.description: Team member calls/emails lead within 24 hours

qualified_public_credit_card.description: Public course - paying by credit card

contact_only.manual_trigger_value: Convert to Only Create a contact

Generate_Payment_URL.action: Generates payment link via Zoho Form

Needs_Analysis.next_stage_trigger: User changes Stage field to Ready to Quote

On_stage_Update_related_Attendees.action: Updates registration record statuses to Confirmed

created_by_workflow.workflow_name: Create Quote - Stage Update Ready to quote

Update_Deal_and_Invoice_on_Quote_Closed_.action: AUTO-CREATES Invoice + Updates Deal to Closed Won

created_by_quote_acceptance.workflow_name: Update Deal and Invoice on Quote Closed Won

Update_Due_Date.action: Calculates due date from payment terms

New_Update_deal_and_Reg_record.action: Links invoice to deal and registration records

Send_on_create_Awaiting_Payment.action: Auto-sends if status = Awaiting Payment on create

updates_related_records.Deal: Stage may update to reflect payment

Populate_Course_Days.action: Creates Course_Days subform entries for attendance

SMS_Attendance_Link.action: Sends SMS with attendance app link

Update_Attendee_for_Payment_Update_with_.action: Links to deal for payment tracking

admin_during_course.description: Monitor attendance, generate PDFs as needed

submit_to_rto.description: Upload coursework to RTO for assessment

status_update.action: Updates related records when status = Completed

private_course_handling.description: For private courses, SOA sent to client/employer

date_or_datetime.description: Fires at specified time before/after a date field

section_update.description: Fires when section of record updated

boolean_field.description: User sets boolean field to TRUE

sequence.action: Deal progresses to Ready to Quote
User creates registration records for each attendee

stage_based_automation.Stage_changes: Multiple workflows trigger on stage changes

created_by: Deal stage change to Ready to Quote (automatic)

automatic_creation_workflow.workflow_name: Create Quote - Stage Update Ready to quote

created_by: User manual triggers from other modules

trigger_sources.manual_triggers: Human sets Create_Team_Task field on various modules

WordPress_Website.failure_impact: Website course listings out of date

Move_Course_Attendee_Folder_on_Course_Ch.action: Moves folder if attendee changes courses

Stripe_Payments.failure_impact: Payments not processed, records not created

values: Convert to Only Create a contact

deal_stage_progression.impact: Triggers quote creation, PO follow-ups, completion workflows

quote_acceptance.impact: Auto-creates Invoice, updates Deal to Closed Won

invoice_sending.impact: Client receives invoice, triggers email workflow

po_entry.impact: Triggers PO received workflows, updates registrations

course_completion.impact: Triggers performance metrics update, archiving workflows

request_attendee_details.action: Email training coordinator for attendee list

update_registration_records.action: Sync course changes to all registrations

check_workflows: Create Quote - Stage Update Ready to quote (52330000002460308)
Update Deal and Invoice on Quote Closed Won (52330000002460325)

deals_detailed_chart.title: Deals Module - Complete Workflow Map
sections: Deal Creation (from Lead conversion or manual)
Stage Progression (with workflows at each stage)
deals_detailed_chart.show_workflows: All 13 deal workflows with trigger conditions

registration_detailed_chart.title: Registration_Records - Complete Journey
registration_detailed_chart.timeline: 15 days before → 14 days → 7 days → Course Day → Post-course

how_is_quote_created.answer: Automatically when Deal.Stage changes to 'Ready to Quote'
how_is_quote_created.workflow: Create Quote - Stage Update Ready to quote (52330000002460308)
how_is_quote_created.next_step: Quote auto-populated with deal data, user reviews and sends

how_is_invoice_created.workflow: Update Deal and Invoice on Quote Closed Won (52330000002460325)
how_is_invoice_created.human_action: User must change Quote.Quote_Stage to Accepted

answers.human_action: Select WF_Action = Convert Pay Via Invoice

answers.workflow: Update Deal and Invoice on Quote Closed Won creates invoice
answers.trigger: Quote accepted, invoice created, links to registration
answers.human_action: Accept quote, then manually create registration or workflow creates
Create registration, link to Course and Attendee

how_are_sms_sent.answer: Automatically by time-based and event-based workflows
how_are_sms_sent.exception: User can manually trigger some SMS via workflow action fields

how_is_workdrive_folder_created.answer: Automatically via Zoho Flow when record created
workflows: Courses: Creates folder on course create
Contacts: Creates folder on contact create
Registration_Records: Creates folder on registration create

registration_count_not_updating.manual_fix: Don't manually update count - fix workflow

quote_not_auto_creating.workflow: Create Quote - Stage Update Ready to quote (52330000002460308)
quote_not_auto_creating.manual_fix: Create quote manually or fix workflow

invoice_not_auto_creating.workflow: Update Deal and Invoice on Quote Closed Won (52330000002460325)
invoice_not_auto_creating.manual_fix: Create invoice manually or fix workflow

sms_not_sending.manual_fix: Send SMS manually or fix integration

workdrive_folder_not_created.manual_fix: Create folder manually or fix Flow
